title: Trump refiles $10bn defamation suit against WSJ over report on Epstein ties – US politics live
summary_full: The lawsuit is one of several that the president has brought in his personal capacity against news organizationsSign up to the Breaking News US emailA judge on Thursday declined to block president Donald Trump’s executive tightening rules on mail-in voting in a loss for the Democratic party, whose lawyers argued that it could disenfranchise millions of voters.The decision comes as Trump’s Republicans are locked in a tight battle to keep control of both houses of the US Congress in the November midterm elections.
